meaning: adj.无启发性的,无益于教化的,(道德上)令人厌恶的
examples: He married a number of wives in his declining years, and his life on the whole was by modern standards unedifying.
He wants to clamp down hard on immigration and would reinstate Mr Howard's unedifying policy of diverting asylum-seekers to impoverished Pacific island microstates.
The ANC's unedifying internal wrangles are only adding to South Africans' growing sense of gloom.
One Independent councillor in 2009 found the daggers drawn at county hall in Truro an unedifying spectacle.
America's support for Peru's disgraced spy chief, Vladimiro Montesinos, is one unedifying example.
